subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up after the conference. I'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar to explore how Vendor Inc. and our team might work together.

Here are some available slots for a 30-minute call next week:

• Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which time works best for you, and I'll arrange the meeting details.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm unable to share internal contact information. However, once we've had our initial conversation and identified mutual areas of interest, I can help facilitate the appropriate introductions through proper channels.

Looking forward to speaking with you!

Best regards
